label: Incident category
description: Groups incidents for storyteller scheduling and parameter generation.

needsParmsPoints.label: Needs parms points
needsParmsPoints.description: If true, this category expects storyteller-generated threat points via IncidentParms. Used for threat and point-scaled quest categories.

tale.label: Tale
tale.description: Default TaleDef recorded for incidents in this category when the incident itself does not specify a tale.

canUseAnomalyChance.label: Can use anomaly chance
canUseAnomalyChance.description: If true, this category is eligible for Anomaly-specific incident chance logic.

basic-incident-category.label: Basic incident category
basic-incident-category.description: Minimal incident category with only the required inherited identity fields.
